lastReleaseMessage: v0.10.0: bar-raise drain (D-006 loopback bind, D-007 import/rollback strict backup-fail, error_log + logEvent, daily prune, regex hoist, analytics surface modules, dedup guard, dashboard preservation, drift-fix F1-F8); .finances/ removed from git index (D-001/D-002 enforcement)

barRaise.topFinding: The code is healthy and the doc layer is aligned for a second straight audit, but the automation loop around this project is visibly broken: nothing has committed since e6cac08 on 2026-05-29, and the F1-F11 doc batch plus seven untracked audit and bar-raise reports now sit in the working tree. Today's canonical audit grades that uncommitted state P0, so the maintainability finding escalates from MEDIUM to HIGH this run: one git checkout erases four-plus audits of work, and the pile grows one file each morning. The mechanical root cause is unchanged and also HIGH: seven of the eight skills CLAUDE.md names are not installed, so the daily audit re-proves the same aligned state and deposits another report with no executor to land it. Two HIGHs stand open, so the verdict regresses from needs-attention to at-risk. Bank statements in git history (MEDIUM) and a stale dashboard audit block (MEDIUM) ride alongside.
